buildStatus.lint: failed (pre-existing errors in unrelated blocks: FullWidthMedia, MainWrapper, TestimonialsCarousel)

fixes.description: CTA hover: replaced transition-opacity hover:opacity-60 with transition-colors hover:text-accent
Search button hover: added transition-colors hover:text-accent text-white to both desktop and mobile search submit buttons
Dropdown min-width: added md:min-w-[calc(100%+3rem)] to submenu container
Fixed header animation: replaced transition-all with transition-[transform,opacity] on header-main wrapper
Fixed header top offset: added 32px base gap to calculateFixedOffset() result — Math.floor(offset) + 32 + 'px'
Dropdown pseudo-element width: replaced before:md:right-0 with before:md:w-full so hover bridge is scoped to dropdown width, not viewport
Focus outline: added outline outline-0 outline-transparent base state to all interactive elements so transition-colors does not cause focus ring blinking
files: blocks/Header/HeaderMain/HeaderMainItem/HeaderMainItem.php (plain link + button — already done in prev session)
blocks/Header/HeaderMain/HeaderMainItem/HeaderMainItem.tsx (plain Link done prev session; submenu button done this session)

fixes.description: ArrowDown/Up from trigger: wrapped focus() in requestAnimationFrame after openSubmenu() to defer until display:none is removed
ArrowUp/Down inside dropdown: handleSubmenuKeydown now re-queries items inside the handler using submenu.querySelectorAll('[role=menuitem]') to avoid stale refs
